package rulecoverage

func NegativeGinHandlerReturnsMultipleResponseShapes() string {
    ruleID := "gin_handler_returns_multiple_response_shapes"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Handlers that manually build several unrelated success payload shapes instead of delegating to clearer endpoints or render helpers."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
